title: angelica arenaria
intro: Angelica arenaria, also known as sea angelica or sea wormwood, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to the coastal areas of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The health benefits of angelica arenaria include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of angelica arenaria include tea, tincture, and infused oil, which can be used to treat various health issues, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
